tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Simple and easy to play on acoustic guitar. Have fun and play with variations of the chords once you're comfortable.

content:
Miranda Lambert - The House That Built Me

Standard Tuning.
Capo 3.

Chords and tab relative to capo.

I'm pretty sure this is 100% accurate.

Please rate and comment.

meganf98@yahoo.com


| h   hammer-on
| p   pull-off
| x   Mute note

[tab]e|---------------------------------------------0h2-2p0---------------------------------|
B|----------------3-----------------------3--------------3--------0h3------------------|
G|------------2--------2----2---------2----------------------2---------4--0--2---------|
D|---0--0--0---------0----0----0--0----------------------------------------------------|
A|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
E|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

[tab]e|---------------0h2--2p0-----------------2-------------------------------------------|
B|----------3---------------5--3--2-------3-------------------------------------------|
G|------2---------------------------------2-------------------------------------------|
D|---0------------------------------------x-------------------------------------------|
A|----------------------------------------x-------------------------------------------|
E|----------------------------------------x-------------------------------------------|[/tab]


Just keep strumming D right into the first verse.

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I know they say you cant go home again[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I just had to come back one last time[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Maam I know you don’t know me from Adam[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                         [ch]A[/ch]
But these handprints on the front steps are mine[/tab]


[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Up those stairs in that little back bedroom[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Is where I did my homework and I learned to play guitar[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I bet you didn’t know under that live oak[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
My favorite dog is buried in the yard[/tab]


[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]D[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Out here its like Im someone else[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear Ill leave[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Wont take nothing but a memory[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
From the house that built me[/tab]


[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Mama cut out pictures of houses for years[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
From Better Homes and Gardens magazine[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Plans were drawn and concrete poured[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Nail by nail and board by board[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Daddy gave life to mamas dream[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]D[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Out here its like Im someone else[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear Ill leave[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Won’t take nothing but a memory[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
From the house that built me[/tab]


[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                       [ch]D[/ch]
You leave home and you move on and you do the best you can[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I got lost in this old world and forgot who I am[/tab]


[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]D[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Out here its like Im someone else[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
If I could walk around I swear Ill leave[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Wont take nothing but a memory[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
From the house that built me[/tab]
